creator: igor.arabesc.pavlov@gmail.com
text:
I see libsodium was updated too. Could it cause instability?
dnscrypt work is stable for several days now. But there was one crash of net/isc-dhcp43-server-4.3.1
There are plenty of resources: 16 GB RAM, tens of gigabytes of free disk space.
How it's better to debug such instabilities?
